name: Deny Rianto
title: Fullstack Software Engineer
about: Fullstack Engineer building scalable, production-grade web and mobile applications.
summary: Fullstack Developer with hands-on experience delivering national-scale platforms, government systems, and healthcare integrations. Specialized in Next.js and Laravel, with strong focus on clean architecture, performance, and remote collaboration.

work.title: Fullstack Engineer
work.description: Contributed to the development of national-scale competition, government, and healthcare systems.
achievements: Built and delivered a major feature for a national-level competition platform, collaborating directly with stakeholders and shipping ahead of schedule.
Owned approximately 35% of total development for a government project and presented solutions directly to end users.
Developed a critical hospital integration with Indonesia’s national health system, coordinating closely with hospital IT teams.

work.title: Mobile Developer
work.description: Developed a cross-platform mobile application in a remote Agile team.
achievements: Built cross-platform mobile features using React Native, Expo, and Redux.
Integrated backend APIs to ensure seamless data flow and state management.
Collaborated in Agile workflows including sprint planning and iterative delivery.

work.title: Owner & Fullstack Developer
work.description: Own and maintain a digital service platform built end-to-end.
achievements: Architected and developed the platform using Next.js, Strapi, PostgreSQL, and S3 storage.
Implemented SSR and SEO optimizations to improve performance and discoverability.
Automated CI/CD pipelines using Coolify and managed self-hosted deployment infrastructure.
Collaborated with UI/UX designers to deliver a high-performance user experience.

work.title: Web Developer Freelance
work.description: Developed a WordPress-based company profile website.
achievements: Designed and developed a responsive company profile website using WordPress and Elementor.
Customized page layouts and components to align with the company’s branding and content requirements.
Optimized website performance, mobile responsiveness, and basic SEO to improve accessibility and user experience.
